description: Reading-room film viewer with two weld radiographs side by side: left floods near-black TOO DARK (chips: overexposure / developer hot), right thin and pale TOO LIGHT, mirrored double-headed arrow + mirrored cause chips (underexposure / developer cold), static density accept band D 2.0-4.0, and bottom-right Ir-192 activity inset halving every ~74 days with 'x 1/2 @ ~74 D' chip.
